name: FormWizardBlueprint
description: A multi-step form wizard with progress indicator, step navigation, validation, and review before submission. Ideal for onboarding flows, checkout processes, and complex data entry.

visual.description: Centered card layout with progress bar at top showing numbered steps. Current step is highlighted. Form content area in the middle with back/next navigation buttons at bottom. Final step shows a review summary before submit.
visual.layout: centered card with progress bar, form content, and navigation buttons

props.name: steps
props.description: Array of step objects with title, description, and optional validation function

props.name: showReview
props.description: Whether to show a review step before final submission

props.name: submitButtonText
props.description: Text for the final submit button
